notes: Emits CLAUDE.md context, .mcp.json, .claude/settings.json patch, .claude/skills/, .claude/agents/
Emits GEMINI.md context, .gemini/settings.json with MCP and hooks, .gemini/agents/, policy TOML
Emits AGENTS.md context, .codex/config.toml MCP patch, .codex/agents/ TOML, .codex/hooks.json
Emits per-file .cursor/rules/*.mdc, .cursor/mcp.json, .cursor/agents/, .cursor/hooks.json, cli.json permissions
Emits AGENTS.md context, opencode.json with model and MCP config, .opencode/skills/
ResolvedConfig merges providers, model, MCP servers, skills, rules, permissions, hooks, env, and provider-specific settings
Provider-aware MCP server entry compilation with per-provider URL field names and transport detection
Skills compiled to provider-specific SKILL.md paths with frontmatter and template resolution
Agent profiles compiled to provider-native subagent files (Claude MD, Gemini MD, Cursor MD, Codex TOML)
Permission presets compiled to provider-specific formats: Claude settings.json, Gemini policy TOML, Cursor cli.json
Hooks compiled to provider-specific formats: Claude settings.json, Gemini settings.json, Cursor hooks.json, Codex hooks.json
Plugin install intent compiled as manifest artifact for CLI execution
Per-skill event subscription namespaces resolved from artifact declarations for actor spawn config
Compiler builds to WASM via wasm-pack for browser-side compilation in Studio
Validate MCP server configs, permission regex patterns, skill references before compilation
Documented guide for adding new providers — descriptor, compile module, permissions, tests
Roundtrip tests for hooks, agents, and all provider features
Expose event_subscriptions in WASM CompileResult for Studio integration
All compiler errors include what went wrong, which file, and how to fix
Runtime-registered providers via WASM plugins — same pure function contract, loaded at compile time
